items.description: AAP credential types configuration
AAP credentials configuration
Credential validation tasks
Handlers — systemd daemon-reload triggered when fastapi-tutorial.service unit file changes
items.notes: Created handlers for systemd daemon-reload and service restart

items.description: Default variables — app path, git repo URL/branch, port, venv path, PostgreSQL user/db/password (vault-referenced), .env content variables
items.notes: Created defaults with app settings, package list, and DB variables referencing AAP credential vars

items.description: Role metadata — platform support (Ubuntu >= 18.04, CentOS >= 7.0), no external dependencies
items.notes: meta/main.yml already exists and is complete (written by pre-generation step); skipped to avoid overwriting

items.description: Main tasks entry point — includes all sub-task files in order
items.notes: Created main.yml orchestrating all task files; validate_credentials.yml included first per AAP credential rules

items.description: Deploy /opt/fastapi-tutorial/.env from Jinja2 template (owner: root, group: root, mode: 0600 — upgraded from 0644 for security); credentials sourced from Ansible Vault
items.notes: Created config.yml deploying .env and systemd unit file templates with notify handlers

items.description: Install system packages: python3, python3-pip, python3-venv, git, postgresql, postgresql-contrib, libpq-dev
items.notes: Created packages.yml with ansible.builtin.package for all system packages

items.description: Create /opt/fastapi-tutorial directory, clone git repo (https://github.com/dibanez/fastapi_tutorial.git, branch: main), create Python venv, install pip dependencies from requirements.txt
items.notes: Created app_deploy.yml with git clone, venv creation, and pip install tasks

items.description: Enable and start postgresql service, create PostgreSQL user 'fastapi', database 'fastapi_db', grant ALL PRIVILEGES — idempotent using ansible.builtin.command with checks
items.notes: Created postgresql.yml with service management and DB/user provisioning using AAP credential vars

items.description: Deploy /etc/systemd/system/fastapi-tutorial.service from Jinja2 template, notify systemd daemon-reload handler, enable and start fastapi-tutorial service
items.notes: Created service.yml enabling and starting fastapi-tutorial via systemd with daemon_reload

items.description: Jinja2 template for /opt/fastapi-tutorial/.env — PROJECT_NAME, API_VERSION, DATABASE_URL (with vault-referenced password). Replaces Chef inline heredoc file resource.
items.notes: Created Jinja2 template using AAP credential variable {{ database_url }}

items.description: Jinja2 template for /etc/systemd/system/fastapi-tutorial.service — ExecStart uvicorn on port 8000, After=postgresql.service. Replaces Chef inline heredoc file resource.
items.notes: Created Jinja2 template for systemd unit file using role variables

items.description: Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (app dir, venv, .env, systemd unit file paths)
items.notes: Creates /tmp/molecule_test/ directory tree mirroring the role's filesystem output: app dir, venv/bin stubs (python, pip, uvicorn), requirements.txt, .env (mode 0640, rendered env.j2 content), and fastapi-tutorial.service (mode 0644, rendered service.j2 content). No become, no include_role, no package installs.

items.description: Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection, no Docker/Podman
No-op instance destroy playbook for delegated driver
No-op instance create playbook for delegated driver
Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths: app dir (mode 0755), venv/bin/uvicorn, .env (mode 0600), fastapi-tutorial.service unit file content
items.notes: Verifies: app dir exists (stat+assert), requirements.txt exists+non-empty, venv dir+bin dir exist, venv/bin/python|pip|uvicorn exist+executable, .env exists+mode 0640+content (PROJECT_NAME, API_VERSION, DATABASE_URL, fastapi_db), systemd unit exists+mode 0644+content (ExecStart uvicorn port 8000, After=postgresql.service, Restart=always, WorkingDirectory, PATH env, WantedBy). Service/port/HTTP checks tagged molecule-notest.

items.description: Created standard meta/main.yml
